dashboard.market_snapshot_hint: Price changes for your current inventory

inventory.aging_retain_reason_placeholder: Explain why you're keeping this vehicle at current price...
inventory.status_sold_immutable: This vehicle is sold and cannot be modified.
inventory.delete_confirm_subtitle: This cannot be undone. The vehicle will be removed from your inventory and marketplace.
inventory.empty_inventory_subtitle: Add your first vehicle to get started. Scan a VIN or enter details manually.

automation.whatsapp_upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Professional for automated sequences
automation.greeting_hint: Sent once when a new contact messages for the first time
automation.away_hint: Sent when messages arrive outside business hours
automation.abandoned_hint: Sent when a lead has had no activity for 7 days
automation.post_sale_hint: Sent after a deal is marked as delivered
automation.inventory_alert_hint: Notify opted-in customers when matching vehicles are listed
automation.third_party_subtitle: For AI chatbots, bulk campaigns, and multi-agent inboxes
automation.sms_optout_auto: "Reply STOP to unsubscribe" will be added automatically
automation.lead_scoring_subtitle: Configure when salespeople receive hot lead alerts
automation.hot_threshold_hint: Score ≥ {{score}} triggers immediate SMS to salesperson
automation.personalized_links_hint: Each lead gets a custom URL showing inventory matching their preferences
automation.rate_limit_reached: Daily {{channel}} limit reached. Messages queued for tomorrow.
automation.festival_mode_active: Festival mode active — some automations paused
automation.read_only_notice: You can view automation rules but cannot edit them on this plan.

website.setup_subtitle: Your dealership website will be live in under 10 minutes

settings.team_member_deactivate_confirm: Deactivate {{name}}? Their leads will be reassigned.
settings.discount_threshold_hint: Discounts above this % require manager/owner approval
settings.target_margin_hint: Used by Maestro to flag expense overruns

marketplace.tagline: Every car. Every dealer. Every deal — in one place.
marketplace.imv_title: Market Range for Similar Cars in {{district}}
marketplace.imv_insufficient: We need more comparable listings to rate this car in {{district}}.
marketplace.imv_national: Based on national data (limited local listings)
marketplace.enquiry_message_placeholder: Any specific questions about this car?
marketplace.enquiry_sent: Enquiry sent! {{dealer}} will contact you shortly.
marketplace.save_search_alert: Alert me when new cars match
marketplace.save_search_saved: Search saved. We'll alert you when new cars match.
marketplace.sell_car_subtitle: Get an instant market price estimate. Free listing.
marketplace.c2c_price_hint: Enter your asking price to see how it compares to the market
marketplace.c2c_competitive_price: ✅ Good Deal — competitive price for a faster sale
marketplace.c2c_great_price: 🔥 Great Deal — this will sell fast!
marketplace.c2c_above_market: ⚠️ Above market — most buyers search below BDT {{suggest}}
marketplace.c2c_submitted: 🎉 Your listing is submitted for review
marketplace.c2c_review_time: Our team will review it within 2 hours during business hours
marketplace.c2c_expiry_note: Your listing is active for 30 days

imv.imv_explanation: AutoVerse compares each car's price to similar listings in the same area to show whether it's a good deal or overpriced.
imv.great_deal_desc: Priced 15%+ below the market average for similar cars
imv.good_deal_desc: Priced 5–15% below market average — a solid deal
imv.fair_price_desc: Priced within 10% of the market average
imv.overpriced_desc: Priced more than 10% above the market average
imv.unrated_desc: Not enough comparable listings in this area yet

payments.pay_subtitle: You will be charged BDT {{amount}} via {{method}}
payments.pay_redirect: You'll be redirected to {{method}} to authorize the payment
payments.pay_success_subtitle: Your {{plan}} plan is now active until {{date}}
payments.pay_failed_subtitle: Your account has not been charged. Please try again.
payments.pay_pending_subtitle: We're activating your account. This may take up to 2 minutes.
payments.grace_period_banner: Your subscription expired. Renew to keep full access.
payments.read_only_banner: Account on hold. Renew your subscription to add inventory and receive leads.
payments.per_lead_charge: BDT {{amount}} will be added to your monthly invoice for this marketplace lead.

notifications.sla_breach_body: {{name}} has been waiting. Assign or contact now.
